category_sources: Official GitHub README describes PyOxidizer as producing binaries that embed Python.
source_facts.description says PyOxidizer is a Python application packaging and distribution tool.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the display name PyOxidizer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says PyOxidizer documentation is generated from docs/ and hosted on gregoryszorc.com.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes embedding Python in single-file executables and notes Rust-generated executables.
source_facts.description identifies packaging and distribution functionality.
